name: Customer Billing Data from CRM to SAP Finance
description: Customer account and invoice data flows from Dynamics 365 CRM to SAP Finance for ledger posting.

name: Outage Notifications from ADMS to CRM
description: ADMS sends outage events and affected premises to Dynamics 365 CRM for customer notification.

name: Asset Register Updates from SAP AM to ADMS
description: SAP Asset Management sends asset master data changes to ADMS for network model alignment.

name: Material Requests from CRM to WMS
description: Service requests requiring materials flow from CRM to WMS for inventory allocation.

name: Network Telemetry from ADMS to Data Lake
description: ADMS streams real-time network telemetry and meter data to Azure Data Lake for analytics.

name: Financial Reports from SAP Finance to Data Lake
description: SAP Finance exports general ledger and cost centre data to Azure Data Lake for regulatory reporting.

name: Employee Directory from SAP HR to Corporate Portal
description: SAP HR publishes employee directory and organisational structure to the Corporate Portal.

name: Asset Depreciation from SAP AM to SAP Finance
description: Asset depreciation postings flow from SAP Asset Management to SAP Finance for ledger updates.

name: Workforce Data from CRM to SAP HR
description: Workforce management data from CRM service scheduling flows to SAP HR.

name: Material Issue Confirmation from WMS to SAP AM
description: WMS confirms material issues to work orders, updating SAP Asset Management inventory.

name: Integration Bus Interconnect
description: Azure Integration Bus provides message brokering between all connected systems.

name: Customer Analytics from CRM to Data Lake
description: CRM exports customer, premise, meter, and consumption data to Azure Data Lake for analytics.
